name: hxc-lsp
description: Wire the `hxc-lsp` server (HXC hexa-canonical wire/storage format LSP — diagnostics + hover, re-validated on every edit) for `.hxc` files in Claude Code. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Requires `hxc-lsp` on PATH (install via `hx install dancinlab/hxc`); if absent, Claude Code surfaces the error in /plugin Errors.
